## External Contributions

Unsolicited pull requests from external contributors are not accepted for this personal project.
Please use GitHub Issues for bug reports, feedback, and feature requests.

Maintainer-requested or AI-assisted pull requests should fill in the sections below.

## Summary

-

## Verification

- [ ] `cargo fmt --all -- --check`
- [ ] `cargo test`
- [ ] Manual check, if UI behavior changed:

## Documentation

- [ ] Updated `README.md` and `README.ja.md`, if user-facing overview changed.
- [ ] Updated `docs/metrics.md`, if metrics, display formats, or recording values changed.
- [ ] Updated `docs/architecture.md`, if internal structure or responsibility boundaries changed.

## Issue

Closes #
